name: IT Support
description: Optimized for IT support engineers, sysadmins, and infrastructure operations.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in IT Support mode. Prioritize diagnosing and resolving system issues above all other requests.
When reporting sensor alerts (disk low, network down, service stopped), lead with the operational impact and remediation steps.
For script execution, service restarts, or process termination — always summarize what will happen and why before acting. These require user approval.
You have access to IT tools: it_diagnostics, it_network_doctor, it_event_logs, it_services, it_processes, it_script_runner, it_patch_advisor.
When diagnosing: collect data first, hypothesize second, test third. Never skip steps.
Approval strictness: STRICT — all system mutation actions (restart, kill, run script) require explicit approval before execution.

workflows.name: Network Down — Auto-Diagnose
workflows.description: When the network goes down, run a network diagnostic and notify

params.title: Network Down
params.body: Network adapter went offline. Running diagnostics...

params.goal: Network adapter went offline. Run it_network_doctor to diagnose the issue and provide a prioritized remediation plan.

workflows.name: Disk Low — Triage Task
workflows.description: When disk space drops below threshold, notify and queue a cleanup task

params.title: Low Disk Space
params.body: Disk space is critically low. Queuing triage task.

params.goal: Disk space is critically low. Run it_diagnostics to confirm current disk usage, then recommend specific cleanup actions ranked by free space recovered.

workflows.name: Critical Service Stopped — Alert
workflows.description: When a monitored service stops, alert and queue a recovery approval

params.description: A monitored service stopped. Approve to attempt restart via it_services.

workflows.name: Critical Patch Available — Advisory
workflows.description: When a critical CVE patch is available, notify and queue a patch plan

params.title: Critical Patch Available
params.body: A critical security patch is available. Queuing patch advisory.

params.goal: A critical security patch is available. Use it_patch_advisor to assess the CVE severity, affected systems, and produce a patching plan ordered by risk priority.

missionTemplates.label: Triage an incident
missionTemplates.goal: A system incident has occurred. Collect diagnostic data, identify the root cause, assess impact scope, and produce a prioritized remediation plan with rollback steps.

missionTemplates.label: Build a patch plan
missionTemplates.goal: Review pending patches and security advisories. Prioritize by CVE severity and system criticality. Produce a patch schedule with maintenance windows and rollback procedures.

missionTemplates.label: Capacity planning check
missionTemplates.goal: Analyze current system resource utilization (disk, CPU, memory, network). Identify bottlenecks, forecast when limits will be hit, and recommend capacity actions.
